name: Peachy Pork Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 6 oz Fresh snow pea pods, trimmed
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim fat from pork.
2. Partially freeze pork; slice diagonally across grain into thin strips.
3. Sprinkle with pepper and salt; set aside.
4. Combine apricot spread, peach nectar, and cornstarch in a small bowl; stir well; set mixture aside.
5. Coat a large nonstick skillet or wok with cooking spray; place over medium-high heat until hot.
6. Add ginger; stir-fry 30 seconds.
7. Add sliced pork; stir-fry 3 minutes.
8. Add reserved apricot mixture; cook 1 minute, or until thickened.
9. Add peaches and snow peas; toss gently.
10. Cover and cook 1 minute, or until thoroughly heated.
Yield: 6 servings (about 204 calories per serving)
Protein: 17.1
Fat: 6
Carbohydrates: 20.8
Cholesterol: 45
Iron: 1.4
